title: PacBio (PACB) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Down Y/Y
text: PacBio delivered Q2 2023 earnings that beat adjusted EPS estimates while revenues missed on a year-over-year basis. The company reported total revenue of $47.6 million in Q2 2023, down from $47.6 million in Q2 2022 versus prior period comparisons. Adjusted loss per share was 26 cents, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of 34 cents per share by 23.5%. PacBio registered a 34% increase in revenue compared to Q2 2022, surpassing estimates by 17.9%. Instrument revenues nearly doubled to $29.9 million from prior year levels of $15.6 million. 47 sequencing systems were recognized for revenue, including 45 Revio and 2 Sequel IIe systems. Revio demand drove another record quarter as the company exceeded $40 million in quarterly revenue for the first time in history. Cash and investments reached $829.9 million with total assets of $1.85 billion. The company raised 2023 revenue expectations to $185-190 million from the prior guidance of $165-180 million.
